---
title: "STA207_Final_Report"
author: "ChiChun-Chen"
date: "2026-03-03"
output: html_document
---

## Setup

```{r setup, include=TRUE}
rm(list = ls())
gc()

# ---- 1. Packages ----
pkgs <- c("haven","dplyr","tidyr","ggplot2","skimr","janitor","GGally",
          "data.table","plotly","stringr","broom","sandwich","lmtest",
          "ggalluvial", "forcats", "scales")
to_install <- pkgs[!pkgs %in% installed.packages()[,"Package"]]
if(length(to_install)>0) install.packages(to_install)
invisible(lapply(pkgs, library, character.only = TRUE))

# ---- 2. Import data ----
setwd("/Users/chichichen/Documents/Master/5-2026Winter/STA 207/Final_Project")
df <- read_sav("STAR_Students.sav") %>% janitor::clean_names()

cat("Total data count:", nrow(df), "\n")
print(head(names(df), 25))

# ---- 3. Variable maps ----
map_long <- list(
  class      = c(k="gkclasstype", g1="g1classtype", g2="g2classtype", g3="g3classtype"),
  school_id  = c(k="gkschid",     g1="g1schid",     g2="g2schid",     g3="g3schid"),
  teacher_id = c(k="gktchid",     g1="g1tchid",     g2="g2tchid",     g3="g3tchid"),
  freelunch  = c(k="gkfreelunch", g1="g1freelunch", g2="g2freelunch", g3="g3freelunch"),
  urban      = c(k="gksurban",    g1="g1surban",    g2="g2surban",    g3="g3surban"),
  tyears     = c(k="gktyears",    g1="g1tyears",    g2="g2tyears",    g3="g3tyears"),
  gender = "gender",
  race   = "race"
)

# ---- 4.  ----


# ---- 5. Outcomes (G3 Total Math Scale Score for SAT) ----
outcomes <- keep_exist("g3tmathss")
```
